summary: City of Oakland zoning GIS dataset effective December 11, 2018 (Ordinance 13513). Columns include base zone, overlay, zone label, ordinance, global ID, object ID, perimeter, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

City of Oakland surplus property inventory listing publicly owned properties available for disposition. Columns include APN, address, name, status, surplus declaration resolution link, informational memorandum link, and geometry.

City of Oakland ticket distribution Form 802 records for city-sponsored events. Columns include event name, event date, department, official name, receiver name, ticket count, total tickets, ticket amount, ticket transfer status, location, purpose, and exception.
Oakland public records request #21-5252 dataset of violations with geographic data. Columns include violation type, date, location, ZIP code, and geometry.
Oakland parking citations from 2019 with geocoded locations. Columns include ticket number, fine amount, meter indicator, match address, geocoder score, X/Y coordinates, ZIP code, and geometry.

Oakland 2023 Point-in-Time (PIT) count map of people experiencing homelessness by location. Columns include sequence number, general location, reported number of people experiencing homelessness, police beat, latitude, longitude, ZIP code, and geocoder.

Oakland Police Department crime statistics and calls for service records for 2011 (PRR 20055). Columns include event number, incident type ID and description, priority, create time, closed time, beat, area ID, agency, and location.

Oakland crime lab employee statistics for 2010 (PRR 22635). Columns include employee number, employee name, position number, job classification title, class number, FTE, fund, grant/project fund, frozen status, and project.

Alameda County 2010 U.S. Census results by census tract. Columns include total population, race/ethnicity breakdown (one race total, other race, multiple race, etc.), census tract name, FIPS codes, and geometry.

City of Oakland sidewalk tree inventory with condition and maintenance data. Columns include tree key, well type, well length, trunk diameter, condition description, arborist date, time, and comments.

Oakland ZIP code boundaries GIS dataset with demographic statistics. Columns include ZIP code area, square miles, housing units, vacant units, renter-occupied units, families, family size, and child household counts.

City of Oakland Infrastructure Transformation Area (ITA) boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include ITA ID, intersection ID, mid-block ID, surrounding mid-block ID, satellite indicator, acreage, comment, and geometry.

East Bay Municipal Utility District (EBMUD) utility meter locations with service addresses. Columns include service address, city code, business class, map zone and tile, ZIP code, northing coordinate, and geometry.
Oakland affordable housing production pipeline showing permits by status. Columns include permit count and status.
City of Oakland city limits boundary GIS dataset. Columns include city name, ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

City of Oakland Business Improvement District (BID) boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include BID name, contact address and phone, year established, ID, global ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

City of Oakland parks and medians GIS dataset with amenity details. Columns include park ID, basketball courts, dog park, restroom, condition description, install and warranty dates, open space indicator, BBQ quantity, and geometry.
Oakland total number of people experiencing homelessness by year. Columns include year and number of people.
Oakland affordable housing development by year showing new construction and preservation. Columns include year, new construction units, and preservation units.

Oakland unemployment rates by race/ethnicity and year. Columns include year and unemployment rates for Black, White, Asian, Pacific Islander, Native American, two or more races, other, Hispanic/Latino, and non-Hispanic populations.
Oakland hazard analysis table with risk ratings. Columns include hazard type, priority, frequency, and risk rating.
City of Oakland annual revenue figures by type. Columns include year, transient occupancy tax, sales tax, and real estate transfer tax.

City of Oakland ticket distribution Form 802 data from 2009 to 2017 for city-sponsored events. Columns include receiver, receiver name, official, event name, event type, ticket purpose, ticket count, date, purpose, and description.
Oakland Police Department non-dispatch stops by race and year. Columns include year and stop counts for Hispanic, White, Asian, African American, and other racial groups.

Oakland unemployment rates by race/ethnicity and year. Columns include year and unemployment rates for Black, White, Asian, Pacific Islander, Native American, two or more races, other, Hispanic/Latino, and non-Hispanic populations.
City of Oakland streams and creeks GIS dataset. Columns include stream name, branch, line type, unique ID, key, shape length, and geometry.

Alameda County 2010 Census census block boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include state and county FIPS, block code, name, urban/rural classification, urban area code, land area, water area, MTFCC code, and geometry.
City of Oakland drainage hot spots priority conservation areas GIS dataset. Columns include name and geometry.
Oakland Police Department use of force incidents by race and year. Columns include year and use-of-force counts for White, Hispanic, African American, Asian, and other racial groups.
City of Oakland Priority Development Areas (PDA) boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include PDA name, ID, area in acres, and geometry.
Oakland number of people exiting homelessness programs by year and destination type. Columns include year, permanent destinations, and temporary destinations.
East Bay Regional Parks boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include park name, status, shape area, shape length, object ID, and geometry.
Oakland total housing production by income level. Columns include income level categories: extremely low, very low, low, and moderate income units.

City of Oakland city facilities GIS dataset. Columns include address, station name, fueling station indicator, maintenance info, condition description, install and warranty dates, generator indicator, and geometry.
City of Oakland vehicular food vending (food truck) permits on private property. Columns include vendor name, description, and geometry.
Oakland Police Department sworn staff counts by race and year. Columns include year and officer counts for White, Black/African American, Asian, Hispanic, and other racial groups.

City of Oakland Class 1 bikeway GIS dataset (off-street bike paths). Columns include bikeway ID, global ID, proposed classification, signage status, signage and stripe installation details, priority program, beginning cross street, and geometry.
Oakland change in households earning less than $30,000 per year from 2017-2019 by race. Columns include race, change in low-income households, and percent change.
City of Oakland police district boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include police district number, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
Oakland people entering homelessness programs by year showing first-time vs. returning enrollees. Columns include year, enrolling for the first time, and returning to homelessness.

City of Oakland underdeveloped parcels adjacent to creeks prioritized for acquisition. Columns include parcel mailing addresses, situs unit, primary contact, economic use, last document, deactivation date, situs ZIP, and geometry.
City of Oakland residential zones within 300 feet of industrial zones GIS dataset. Columns include base zone, overlay, zone label, ordinance, last update, FID, ID, area, perimeter, and geometry.
City of Oakland Business Improvement Districts (BIDs) as of April 2009 GIS dataset. Columns include BID name, contact name, address, phone, year established, number of parcels, ID, and geometry.
City of Oakland 2014 police beats GIS dataset. Columns include beat number, name, full name, section, district, acreage, action, flag, ID, shape area, and shape length.

City of Oakland census tract ethnicity GIS dataset with 2010 Census race data. Columns include total population by race (White, American Indian, multiple race, other race, one race total), census tract FIPS codes, and geometry.
City of Oakland urban corridors and connectors GIS dataset for resilience and urban greening. Columns include type, ID, and geometry.

Oakland assisted housing inventory from February 2014 with geocoded addresses. Columns include street address, total units, accessible units, extremely low income units, special condition, state, match type, side, geocoder score, and phone.
City of Oakland high particulate matter areas priority conservation GIS dataset. Columns include area name and geometry.
Oakland people experiencing homelessness by race showing percentage of homeless and general population. Columns include race, percentage of homeless population, and percentage of Oakland population.

City of Oakland Brittleleaf Manzanita (Arctostaphylos tomentosa ssp. crinita) vegetation stand locations GIS dataset. Columns include stand name, shape area, shape length, folder path, snippet, and geometry.
Oakland public housing inventory from 2014 with geocoded addresses. Columns include map address, street address, description, status, match type, match address, geocoder score, side, and geometry.

City of Oakland traffic signals GIS dataset with operational status and condition. Columns include signal ID, operational and maintenance status, condition description, interconnect indicator, WBLT, EBLT indicators, install and warranty dates, and geometry.
City of Oakland creek restoration priority project locations GIS dataset. Columns include project name, ID, and geometry.

City of Oakland General Plan land use designations GIS dataset effective May 2015. Columns include classification, general plan code, resolution, update date, area, perimeter, original FID, and geometry.
